title: calanthe striata
intro: Calanthe striata, also known as the striped calanthe, is a type of orchid native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Calanthe striata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Calanthe striata can be made by drying the plant's roots and leaves, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or using them in combination with other herbs to create a tincture or topical cream.
